meta.title: this drum solo does not exist (made with HarmonAI)
meta.description:
Tired of the same drum solos? Here is something new.
The computer generated novel drum solos using HarmonAI's Dance Diffusion model.
The model was finetuned using drum solos taken from vinyl records.

Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

All using this notebooks:
https://github.com/Harmonai-org/sample-generator

You can download the checkpoint file to generate your own drum solos from here:
https://archive.org/download/wax-solo-drums-epoch3100-step204000

The tools the computer use to create the movie:
Stable Diffusion (for the record cover generations)
https://stability.ai/blog/stable-diffusion-public-release

watch the prompt video
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RUatYr6PZdo&t=2s

watch an horror movie made with ai:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=85Eg2N_YZ24&t=99s

nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
